proposals.title: Classifier confidence is 0.55 — enrich the brief
proposals.rationale: Low classifier confidence means the brief's rule matches are all near the 0.5 prior. Enriching the brief gives the classifier more signal to work with; a Claude refinement pass may also be worth enabling.

hints: Add a pricePoint range — helps the classifier tune payment-forge mode.
targetCustomer is generic — specifying the buyer persona strengthens lead-hunter + content-factory signals.

proposals.title: 11 enabled real-time bridges never fired in the simulator battery
proposals.rationale: These edges are either (a) metadata-only bridges without a transform in bridge-simulator, (b) fired by events not in SAMPLE_PAYLOADS, or (c) legitimately dormant until real traffic arrives. Investigate which category each falls into.

vendors.name: Vercel
vendors.why: Next.js + edge hosting for the public site and app.

vendors.name: Supabase Auth
vendors.why: Email/password + OAuth + magic-link auth out of the box.

vendors.name: Cloudflare R2
vendors.why: S3-compatible object storage for brand assets, uploads, backups.

vendors.name: Plausible
vendors.why: Privacy-friendly web analytics; GDPR-ready without cookies.

vendors.name: Stripe
vendors.why: One-time checkout + Stripe Tax for VAT calculation.

vendors.name: Supabase (ecom schema)
vendors.why: Products + variants + stock tracked in the app-forge DB.

vendors.name: Shippo
vendors.why: Label generation + rate comparison across carriers.

vendors.name: Chatwoot
vendors.why: Order-lookup automation tied to the ecom schema.
